cloud_votes.evidence: The mask corresponds to the character's right foot per COCO pose-chain nearest-distance evidence, fully covers the visible foot region (ankle joint to toes) with a tight, anatomically plausible boundary and no contamination from background, clothing, or the neighboring leg.
